calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant EWO Transport.

Dept. 505; Judge Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:23 am and concluding at 9:31 am

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. is represented by George Aposhian, Esq.
Defendant EWO Transport not appearing.
Proof of service on file.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant EWO Transport.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., is awarded judgment against Defendant EWO Transport as follows:

Damages/Principal: $67,445.25
Pre-Judgment Interest $14,933.74
Costs: $607.37
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Total Judgment: $85,811.36

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
